titleStmt.title: SII 9.152: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 152. (A.R. No. 414 of 1920.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE BHOGESVARA TEMPLE AT UNDABANDA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 7, Dundubhi (= A.D. 1082-83) with no other details. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and records that Āhavamaṇḍalēśvara Iṟiva-Maṅgarasa made a gift of 42 mattars of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti [.] samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara(mēsvare) paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷu
kyābharaṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara
noṟeyūrapuravarēsvara vīrāṁga paranārīsahōdara janakī
cakavrikōdara kāsyapagōtra karikālacōḷānvayapavitra kaṁbaḷaghōṣaṇa
maṇḍaḷikabhūṣaṇaṁ rājamāndhāta nondiṟa vīranārāyaṇaṁ caturapā
rāyaṇaṁ ripunripakāḷadaṇḍa mandāgā bhāva gaṇḍara bīra vandijana
kalpataru śrīmatu tribhuvanamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadāhavamaṇḍaḷēsvaraniṟivamaṁ
garasar śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣa 7 neyara duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada pu
cārige Iśā keyi maṇnalagauḍana ghaḷayi
nyadigbhāgadalu pintaṇa mattarnnālvatteraḍaroḷaga
kuṟukeyiṁ teṁka seleyūra polavēre paḍuvalu
teṁka kere baḍagalu dāvaḷḷadō
ranna vriti ba matta 30
dāri paḍuvalu matta
Antu nāḷvatteraḍu .Lines 17 to 20 are
Digital edition of SII 9.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
